title: Neutral Money vs Political Money
description: Neutral money minimizes discretionary favoritism, while political money embeds policy preferences and selective intervention. This contrast helps explain why credible neutrality matters for global settlement assets.

resources.title: Bitcoin Dev Philosophy: Neutrality
resources.notes: Direct framing of neutrality as a system design goal.

resources.title: Denationalisation of Money
resources.notes: Competition-based argument against politically monopolized currency.

resources.title: The Road to Serfdom
resources.notes: Background on centralized economic control and institutional incentives.

resources.title: The Bitcoin Standard
resources.notes: Bitcoin-oriented argument for neutral money over discretionary monetary control.
